description: Istio service mesh monitoring dashboard for tracking traffic, performance, errors, and security
title: Istio Monitoring (Prometheus)

widgets.description: Total number of requests processed by the service mesh

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Rate of incoming requests per second

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: Average latency of requests within the mesh

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Average Latency

widgets.description: Percentage of failed requests compared to total

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster AND response_code =~ '5.*'

widgets.title: Error Rate

widgets.description: Distribution of requests across destination services

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Request Distribution by Destination

widgets.description: Requests grouped by HTTP response code

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Request Distribution by Response Code

widgets.description: Circuit breaker ejection events

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Outlier Detection Ejections

widgets.description: Number of retry attempts and timeout occurrences

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Retries and Timeouts

widgets.description: Latency percentiles for requests

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Request Latency (p50, p95, p99)

widgets.description: Number of requests processed per unit of time

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Throughput

widgets.description: Response times of individual services within the mesh

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Service Response Times by Destination

widgets.description: Data volume transferred through the mesh

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Bytes Sent and Received

widgets.description: Rate of HTTP errors across services

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: HTTP Error Rates (4xx, 5xx)

widgets.description: Rate of gRPC errors encountered in service communications

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster AND grpc_response_status != ''

widgets.title: gRPC Error Rates

widgets.description: Failed requests attributed to each service

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster AND response_code =~ '5.*'

widgets.title: Failed Requests by Service

widgets.description: Number of connection errors encountered

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Connection Failures

widgets.description: CPU usage for Istio control plane components

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND cluster = $cluster AND service.name =~ 'istiod.*'

widgets.title: CPU Usage (Control Plane)

widgets.description: Memory consumption of Istio control plane components

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND cluster = $cluster AND service.name =~ 'istiod.*'

widgets.title: Memory Usage (Control Plane)

widgets.description: Number of restarts for Istio pods

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND cluster = $cluster AND service.name =~ 'istio.*'

widgets.title: Pod Restarts

widgets.description: Resource consumption of Envoy sidecar proxies

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND cluster = $cluster AND service.name =~ 'istio-proxy.*'

widgets.title: Sidecar Proxy CPU and Memory

widgets.description: Number of configuration pushes by Pilot (istiod)

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Pilot Configuration Pushes

widgets.description: Number of errors during proxy configuration pushes

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Pilot Proxy Push Errors

widgets.description: Number of proxies currently connected to Pilot

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Pilot Connected Proxies

widgets.description: Number of certificates issued by Citadel for mTLS

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Citadel Certificate Issuance

widgets.description: Number of connections secured with mutual TLS

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster AND connection_security_policy = 'mutual_tls'

widgets.title: Mutual TLS Sessions

widgets.description: Requests denied by authorization policies

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Authorization Policy Denials

widgets.description: Expiration time of certificates managed by Istio

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service_name AND cluster = $cluster

widgets.title: Certificate Expiry Time
